name: Media Word Filter
description: Mutes filtered phrases during Jellyfin Web playback using Media Word Filter mute data. Requires the File Transformation plugin for client script injection.
overview: Server-side Media Word Filter companion: details-page profile controls, playback OSD toggle, mute proxy, and next-episode prefetch.

versions.changelog: Pass Newtonsoft JObject to File Transformation RegisterTransformation (matches Jellyfin Enhanced).
Fix File Transformation registration timing via deferred startup task (same pattern as Jellyfin Enhanced).
Initial release for Jellyfin 10.11.x: details/OSD UI, mute/profile proxy, next-episode prefetch.
